metaData.Key Information: Extra Strong and Safe, does not leave bits on your food. Vinda Platinum Multi-Purpose Kitchen Towel is able to absorb 3x oil of its own product weight, removing excess oil from fried food. Every sheet of tissue from Vinda Deluxe is made with Knitted Fiber Technology and sustainable sourced 100% virgin wood pulp, making it strong even when wet. Vinda Deluxe Kitchen Towel are certified Food Safe certified by Germany LFGB standards. 2ply thickness. Each pack contains 180 sheets.
